HOMEPAGE_FAQ.q: How do I book a salon or saloon appointment in Jammu on TrimiT?
HOMEPAGE_FAQ.a: Search for a service, salon, or saloon on TrimiT, pick an available time slot, and confirm your booking. You can browse salons and saloons in Jammu without an account; sign up when you are ready to book.

HOMEPAGE_FAQ.q: Is TrimiT available for salon/saloon booking near me in Jammu?
HOMEPAGE_FAQ.a: Yes. TrimiT lists salons and saloons across Jammu with distance sorting when you allow location, or defaults to central Jammu so you can find premium saloons near you in Jammu quickly.

HOMEPAGE_FAQ.q: Can I pay at the salon or saloon?
HOMEPAGE_FAQ.a: Many partner salons and saloons support pay-at-salon/cash-at-salon. Service prices are shown before you book so you know what to expect.

HOMEPAGE_FAQ.q: How do salon/saloon owners list on TrimiT?
HOMEPAGE_FAQ.a: Salon and saloon owners can list for free by signing up as an owner, creating a salon profile, and adding services. You will receive online bookings through your owner dashboard.

HOMEPAGE_FAQ.q: What services can I book in Jammu?
HOMEPAGE_FAQ.a: Haircuts, beard grooming, spa and wellness, facials, bridal makeup, beauty parlour, and beauty saloon services — all bookable through TrimiT in Jammu.

HOMEPAGE_FAQ.q: Do I need the Android app to book a saloon slot?
HOMEPAGE_FAQ.a: You can explore salons and saloons on the web. For the best booking experience and notifications, download the TrimiT Android app.

HOMEPAGE_FAQ.q: Are salon and saloon listings verified?
HOMEPAGE_FAQ.a: Salons and saloons on TrimiT are real businesses with profiles managed by owners. Customer reviews help you choose trusted professionals.

HOMEPAGE_FAQ.q: Can I cancel or reschedule a booking?
HOMEPAGE_FAQ.a: After signing in, manage your saloon/salon bookings from My Bookings. Cancellation policies may vary by salon.
